title: Identification of Beneficiary for "Medicinal Plant Processing and Dhoop Bhatti Making Training
summary: The identification of beneficiaries for the "Medicinal Plant Processing and Dhoop Bhatti Making Training" programme was carried out in Uttarkashi District from 19–22 January 2026 under the project ...
detailText: The identification of beneficiaries for the "Medicinal Plant Processing and Dhoop Bhatti Making Training" programme was carried out in Uttarkashi District from 19–22 January 2026 under the project titled "Establishment of SC/ST Cell in UCOST (Phase II)". The activity was undertaken to identify and select eligible beneficiaries from Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe communities for capacity-building and skill development in medicinal plant processing and dhoop bhatti (incense stick) production, with the objective of promoting sustainable livelihood opportunities.

title: Meeting and Awareness Program
summary: A two day meeting and awareness program was successfully organised at Chakrata Block, Dehradun District on 29th and 30th December, 2025 under project titled "Establishment of SC/ST Cell in UCOST (P...
detailText: A two day meeting and awareness program was successfully organised at Chakrata Block, Dehradun District on 29th and 30th December, 2025 under project titled "Establishment of SC/ST Cell in UCOST (Phase II) ".

title: TRAINING ON INNOVATION PINE NEEDLE UTILIZATION FOR SUSTAINABLE LIVELIHOODS
summary: A two day "TRAINING ON INNOVATION PINE NEEDLE UTILIZATION FOR SUSTAINABLE LIVELIHOODS" was organised at Mahila Praudyogiki Kendra, Champawat on 18th-19th December, 2025 under Establishment of sched...
detailText: A two day "TRAINING ON INNOVATION PINE NEEDLE UTILIZATION FOR SUSTAINABLE LIVELIHOODS" was organised at Mahila Praudyogiki Kendra, Champawat on 18th-19th December, 2025 under Establishment of schedule Caste / Schedule Tribe Cell in UCOST (Phase- II) by Uttarakhand Council for Science & Technology, Dehradun with financially support from Department of Science & Technology (DST), Government of India (GoI).

title: Brain Storming Session
summary: A Brain Storming Session in 20th Uttarakhand State Science & Technology Conference - 2025 on building resilient communities focusing on enablement of tribal communities: Leveraging conventional kno...
detailText: A Brain Storming Session in 20th Uttarakhand State Science & Technology Conference - 2025 on building resilient communities focusing on enablement of tribal communities: Leveraging conventional knowledge and traditional practices was organised on 29th November, 2025 at Graphic Era University, Dehradun.

title: PARTICIPATION IN JANJATIYA GAURAV DIVAS 2022
summary: Members of the project team of "Establishment of SC/ST Cell in UCOST" successfully participated in the Janjatiya Gaurav Divas 2022 celebration held in Guwahati. The event was graced by Shri Arjun M...
detailText: Members of the project team of "Establishment of SC/ST Cell in UCOST" successfully participated in the Janjatiya Gaurav Divas 2022 celebration held in Guwahati. The event was graced by Shri Arjun Munda, Hon'ble Union Minister of Tribal Aﬀairs, Government of India. The participation provided an opportunity to engage with stakeholders, showcase the project's initiatives, and exchange knowledge and best practices for the socio-economic development and empowerment of tribal communities.

title: USER'S MEETING (KUMAON REGION)
summary: User's meeting was organized for Kumaon Districts at Biotechnology Department, Kumaon University, Bhimtal Campus on dated 23rd May 2022. Participants were nominated by District magistrate as a noda...
detailText: User's meeting was organized for Kumaon Districts at Biotechnology Department, Kumaon University, Bhimtal Campus on dated 23rd May 2022. Participants were nominated by District magistrate as a nodal oﬃcer for the establishment of SC/ST cell. Baseline information like government schemes for SC/ST Community, Traditional Knowledge, important crops, Natural resources, S&T based interventions were collected.

title: USER'S MEETING (GARHWAL REGION)
summary: User's meeting was organized for Garhwal Districts at UCOST, Dehradun. Participants were nominated by District magistrate as a nodal oﬃcer for the establishment of SC/ST cell.
detailText: User's meeting was organized for Garhwal Districts at UCOST, Dehradun. Participants were nominated by District magistrate as a nodal oﬃcer for the establishment of SC/ST cell. Baseline information like government schemes for SC/ST Community, Traditional Knowledge, important crops, Natural resources, and S&T based interventions were collected.
